description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior features light-colored walls, large glass windows, and a spacious wooden deck area with outdoor seating. There is a small green lawn on one side and several trees and shrubs surrounding the property, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The house has a prominent balcony on the upper floor, partially shaded by the roof overhang. The main entrance is accessible via a set of steps leading up to the deck, and the overall layout emphasizes open, airy spaces with strong geometric lines. The landscaping is minimalistic, complementing the contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and minimalistic landscaping with trees and a small lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden deck with outdoor seating, and a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the green lawn, and the house's elongated rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper balcony, large windows, and trees positioned behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side windows, and a tree-lined edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps leading to a wooden deck, modern door, and minimal overhang
